utility_evaluation.REASONING:
First, let's count how many items are required in the format: 1) health_coverage, 2) property_coverage, 3) travel_coverage, 4) additional_services, 5) total_budget. That makes a total of 5 items. Next, let's see which of these are present in the final coverage plan:

1) health_coverage: Present. Includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs clearly stated for each plan and add-ons. ✓
2) property_coverage: Present. Includes home/contents insurance with cost for base and add-ons. ✓
3) travel_coverage: Present. Includes travel insurance base plan with costs and add-ons with costs. ✓
4) additional_services: Present. Includes enhancement services with cost. ✓
5) total_budget: Present. Includes complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. ✓

All 5 items are present and fully specified with costs as required.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
First, identify all the items listed in the final coverage plan. Then, match each of these items exactly to the corresponding option in the ground-truth ratings and extract the associated rating number.

1. Physical health: "LifeFirst Standard Plan — 24/7 support, low deductible (5%), telemedicine, gym reimbursement (€100/month)" matches "LifeFirst Standard Plan" under primary_health_coverage -> physical_health, which has a rating of 8.
2. Mental health: "EliteCare Premium Plan — Private practice, personalized treatment, specialist stress management (€120/month)" matches "EliteCare Premium Plan" under primary_health_coverage -> mental_health, which has a rating of 10.
3. Add-ons (health): "Preventive Care Package (€150/month)" matches "Preventive Care Package" under health_enhancement_services, rating 9; "Emergency Mental Health Care (€50/month)" matches same name under health_enhancement_services, rating 8.
4. Property base: "EliteHome Premium Coverage — Concierge claim service, luxury & business item coverage (€95/month)" matches "EliteHome Premium Coverage" under property_protection -> home_content, rating 10.
5. Property add-on: "Home Office Protection (€35/month)" matches "Home Office Protection" under property_enhancement_services, rating 8.
6. Travel base: "PrimeTravel Premium Plan — Unlimited medical, luxury travel protection, 24/7 global assistance (€115/month)" matches "PrimeTravel Premium Plan" under mobility_coverage -> travel_insurance, rating 10.
7. Travel add-on: "Premium Medical Network — Private hospitals & English-speaking doctors worldwide (€75/month)" matches "Premium Medical Network" under travel_enhancement_services, rating 10.
8. Additional services (general_services): "Premium Insurance Membership — 15% discount on all policies, dedicated advisor, priority claims (€20/month)" matches "Premium Insurance Membership" under general_services, rating 10.
